query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('subjects','curriculumTopics') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('subjects','curriculumTopics') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;
